# rookiedanslepaddock.github.io
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Burgundy Racing School</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    :root {
      --burgundy:#6D0F2A; --burgundy-dark:#4A0A1C;
      --gold:#C9A84C; --gold-light:#E8C97A; --gold-dark:#A07830;
      --white:#FFFFFF; --dark:#1A0A0F;
    }
    *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
    body{font-family:'Raleway',sans-serif;background:var(--dark);color:var(--white);overflow-x:hidden;}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:8px;}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--burgundy-dark);}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--gold);border-radius:4px;}

    
    /* ── ANIMATED BACKGROUND ── */
    body::before {
        content: '';
        position: fixed;
        top: 0; left: 0;
        width: 100%; height: 100%;
        z-index: -2;
        background:
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 20%, rgba(109,15,42,0.5) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, rgba(109,15,42,0.5) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.07) 0%, transparent 65%),
            var(--dark);
        animation: bgShift 16s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }
    body::after {
        content: '';
        position: fixed;
        top: 0; left: 0;
        width: 200%; height: 200%;
        z-index: -1;
        background: repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 80px,
            rgba(201,168,76,0.025) 80px,
            rgba(201,168,76,0.025) 81px
        );
        animation: gridMove 25s linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes bgShift {
        0%   { background:
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 15% 15%, rgba(109,15,42,0.55) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 85% 85%, rgba(109,15,42,0.45) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.07) 0%, transparent 65%),
            var(--dark); }
        25%  { background:
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 10%, rgba(109,15,42,0.6) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 15% 80%, rgba(109,15,42,0.4) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 85% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.08) 0%, transparent 65%),
            var(--dark); }
        50%  { background:
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 90%, rgba(109,15,42,0.5) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 90% 15%, rgba(109,15,42,0.5) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.09) 0%, transparent 65%),
            var(--dark); }
        75%  { background:
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 10% 50%, rgba(109,15,42,0.55) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 20%, rgba(109,15,42,0.45) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 70%, rgba(201,168,76,0.07) 0%, transparent 65%),
            var(--dark); }
        100% { background:
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 60%, rgba(109,15,42,0.5) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 10%, rgba(109,15,42,0.55) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.1) 0%, transparent 65%),
            var(--dark); }
    }
    @keyframes gridMove {
        0%   { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
        100% { transform: translate(-81px, 81px) rotate(0deg); }
    }

    /* Particules flottantes */
    .particles { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: -1; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden; }
    .particle {
        position: absolute;
        border-radius: 50%;
        opacity: 0;
        animation: floatUp linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes floatUp {
        0%   { transform: translateY(100vh) translateX(0px) scale(0); opacity: 0; }
        5%   { opacity: 0.6; }
        50%  { transform: translateY(50vh) translateX(30px) scale(1); opacity: 0.3; }
        95%  { opacity: 0.1; }
        100% { transform: translateY(-5vh) translateX(-20px) scale(0.5); opacity: 0; }
    }

    /* Orbes lumineux */
    .orb {
        position: fixed;
        border-radius: 50%;
        filter: blur(80px);
        opacity: 0;
        z-index: -1;
        pointer-events: none;
        animation: orbFloat ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes orbFloat {
        0%   { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.8) translate(0, 0); }
        20%  { opacity: 1; }
        50%  { transform: scale(1.2) translate(30px, -20px); }
        80%  { opacity: 1; }
        100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.8) translate(0, 0); }
    }

    /* ── NAV ── */
    nav{position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:1000;background:rgba(26,10,15,0.97);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold-dark);padding:10px 0;}
    .nav-container{max-width:1300px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 30px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
    .nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;}
    .nav-logo-img{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(201,168,76,0.35);overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--burgundy-dark);}
    .nav-logo-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;object-position:center;display:block;padding:4px;}
    .nav-logo-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2px;}
    .nav-logo-sub{font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);}
    .nav-links a{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);text-decoration:none;margin-left:18px;font-size:0.74rem;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;transition:color 0.3s;cursor:pointer;}
    .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
    .nav-links a.active{color:var(--gold);border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);padding-bottom:2px;}

    /* ── PAGES ── */
    .page{display:none;}
    .page.active{display:block;}

    /* ── HERO ── */
    #hero{height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--burgundy-dark) 0%,var(--burgundy) 55%,#8B1A2A 100%);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
    #hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,transparent,transparent 40px,rgba(201,168,76,0.03) 40px,rgba(201,168,76,0.03) 41px);}
    .hero-logo-wrapper{width:200px;height:200px;border-radius:50%;border:4px solid var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(201,168,76,0.4),0 0 120px rgba(201,168,76,0.15);overflow:hidden;margin:0 auto 40px auto;position:relative;z-index:1;background:var(--burgundy-dark);animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
    .hero-logo-wrapper img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;object-position:center;display:block;padding:8px;}
    @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(201,168,76,0.4),0 0 120px rgba(201,168,76,0.15);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 80px rgba(201,168,76,0.6),0 0 160px rgba(201,168,76,0.25);}}
    .hero-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,4.5rem);font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:4px;text-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);position:relative;z-index:1;}
    .hero-subtitle{font-size:0.9rem;letter-spacing:6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);margin-top:12px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
    .hero-tag{margin-top:18px;display:inline-block;padding:6px 20px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.12);border:1px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold);font-size:0.78rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;position:relative;z-index:1;}
    .hero-cta{margin-top:44px;display:flex;gap:20px;position:relative;z-index:1;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
    .btn{padding:14px 32px;border:2px solid var(--gold);font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s;display:inline-block;}
    .btn-primary{background:var(--gold);color:var(--burgundy-dark);font-weight:700;}
    .btn-primary:hover{background:transparent;color:var(--gold);}
    .btn-outline{background:transparent;color:var(--gold);}
    .btn-outline:hover{background:var(--gold);color:var(--burgundy-dark);}

    /* ── SECTIONS ── */
    .section-wrapper{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:100px 30px;}
    .section-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:2rem;color:var(--gold);text-align:center;letter-spacing:4px;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .section-divider{width:80px;height:3px;background:var(--gold);margin:0 auto 60px;}

    /* ── EVENTS ── */
    .events-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:28px;}
    .event-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(107,15,42,0.6),rgba(74,10,28,0.8));border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25);border-left:4px solid var(--gold);padding:28px;transition:transform 0.3s,box-shadow 0.3s;}
    .event-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(201,168,76,0.1);}
    .event-date{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;}
    .event-name{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;}
    .event-location{font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);}
    .event-sim{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.7);margin-top:6px;font-style:italic;}
    .event-badge{display:inline-block;margin-top:16px;padding:4px 14px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.1);border:1px solid var(--gold);font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;}

    /* ── RESULTS ── */
    #section-resultats{background:rgba(26,10,15,0.5);}
    table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.9rem;}
    thead tr{background:var(--gold);color:var(--burgundy-dark);}
    thead th{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;padding:16px 20px;text-align:left;letter-spacing:2px;font-size:0.8rem;}
    tbody tr{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);transition:background 0.2s;}
    tbody tr:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,0.05);}
    tbody td{padding:14px 20px;}
    .pos-1{color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;}
    .pos-2{color:#C0C0C0;font-weight:700;}
    .pos-3{color:#CD7F32;font-weight:700;}

    /* ── MEMBERS ── */
    .members-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:28px;}
    .member-card{text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(107,15,42,0.5),rgba(74,10,28,0.7));border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);padding:36px 24px;transition:transform 0.3s,box-shadow 0.3s;}
    .member-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(201,168,76,0.15);}
    .member-card.founder{border-color:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.15);}
    .member-avatar{width:90px;height:90px;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 20px;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);}
    .founder .member-avatar{border-width:4px;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(201,168,76,0.25);}
    
    .pilot-badge{display:inline-block;margin-bottom:12px;padding:3px 12px;background:transparent;color:var(--gold);border:1px solid var(--gold);font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;}

    .founder-badge{display:inline-block;margin-bottom:12px;padding:3px 12px;background:var(--gold);color:var(--burgundy-dark);font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;}
    .member-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .member-role{font-size:0.78rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);margin-bottom:8px;}
    .member-sim{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.7);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .member-number{display:inline-block;padding:4px 16px;border:1px solid var(--gold);font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--gold);font-size:0.85rem;}

    
    /* ── MEMBER NATIONALITY ── */
    .member-nationality{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:10px;padding:4px 12px;background:rgba(0,84,166,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(0,84,166,0.35);border-radius:3px;font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);font-weight:600;}
    .member-nationality .flag{font-size:1.1rem;text-transform:none;}
    .member-nationality .nat-label{text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;}

    
    /* ── MEMBER PARTICIPATIONS ── */
    .member-participations{margin-top:14px;text-align:left;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);padding-top:12px;}
    .member-participations-title{font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.6);margin-bottom:8px;font-weight:700;}
    .member-participation-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:0.72rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);line-height:1.4;}
    .member-participation-item::before{content:'🏁';font-size:0.75rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;}
    .participation-race{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);font-weight:600;}
    .participation-sim{color:rgba(201,168,76,0.6);font-style:italic;font-size:0.67rem;}

    
    /* ── RECRUTEMENT ── */
    #section-recrutement { background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(74,10,28,0.6) 0%, rgba(26,10,15,0.95) 100%); }
    .recruit-wrapper { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; }
    .recruit-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 5px 18px; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.12); border: 1px solid var(--gold); color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .recruit-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 900; color: var(--white); letter-spacing: 3px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .recruit-title span { color: var(--gold); }
    .recruit-text { font-size: 0.95rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); line-height: 1.9; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto 40px; }
    .recruit-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
    @media(max-width:600px){ .recruit-cards { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
    .recruit-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); padding: 28px 24px; text-align: left; transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s; }
    .recruit-card:hover { border-color: var(--gold); transform: translateY(-4px); }
    .recruit-card-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .recruit-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .recruit-card-text { font-size: 0.8rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); line-height: 1.7; }
    .recruit-discord { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 16px 36px; background: #5865F2; color: white; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.3s; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(88,101,242,0.4); }
    .recruit-discord:hover { background: #4752c4; transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(88,101,242,0.5); }
    .recruit-discord svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; fill: white; }
    .recruit-requirements { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
    .recruit-req { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25); color: rgba(201,168,76,0.8); font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; }

    /* ── LIVERY PAGE ── */
    .page-header{padding:130px 30px 70px;text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--burgundy-dark) 0%,var(--burgundy) 60%,#8B1A2A 100%);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
    .page-header::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,transparent,transparent 40px,rgba(201,168,76,0.03) 40px,rgba(201,168,76,0.03) 41px);}
    .page-header-sim{display:inline-block;padding:5px 18px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.12);border:1px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold);font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:18px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
    .page-header h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.8rem);font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:4px;text-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);position:relative;z-index:1;}
    .page-header p{margin-top:12px;font-size:0.88rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);text-transform:uppercase;position:relative;z-index:1;}
    .page-header-count{margin-top:20px;display:inline-block;padding:6px 20px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:2px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
    .page-header-count span{color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;}
    .back-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:30px 30px 0;padding:10px 24px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.35);color:rgba(201,168,76,0.65);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all 0.3s;cursor:pointer;background:transparent;}
    .back-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);}

    /* ── LIVERY GRID ── */
    .livery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(340px,1fr));gap:32px;}
    .livery-card{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(107,15,42,0.45),rgba(74,10,28,0.75));border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.18);overflow:hidden;transition:transform 0.3s,box-shadow 0.3s,border-color 0.3s;position:relative;}
    .livery-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(201,168,76,0.13);border-color:rgba(201,168,76,0.5);}
    .livery-card.real{border-color:rgba(201,168,76,0.4);}
    .livery-thumb{width:100%;height:210px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(90,10,35,0.9),rgba(20,3,10,0.95));display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);}
    .livery-thumb img.car-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;object-position:center;display:block;padding:8px;transition:transform 0.4s ease;}
    .livery-card:hover .livery-thumb img.car-img{transform:scale(1.04);}
    .livery-thumb::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,transparent,transparent 20px,rgba(201,168,76,0.02) 20px,rgba(201,168,76,0.02) 21px);pointer-events:none;}
    .ph-logo{width:65px;height:65px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);overflow:hidden;opacity:0.4;margin-bottom:10px;}
    .ph-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
    .ph-label{font-size:0.63rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.3);}
    .ph-num{position:absolute;bottom:10px;right:14px;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:3rem;font-weight:900;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.05);line-height:1;}
    .livery-real-badge{position:absolute;top:12px;left:12px;z-index:2;padding:3px 10px;background:var(--gold);color:var(--burgundy-dark);font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:800;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;}
    .livery-info{padding:20px 22px 22px;}
    .livery-car{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:5px;letter-spacing:1px;}
    .livery-name{font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.5;}
    .livery-footer{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);gap:10px;}
    .livery-sim-tag{font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.55);font-weight:600;}
    .livery-dl{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 16px;border:1px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;transition:all 0.3s;white-space:nowrap;}
    .livery-dl:hover{background:var(--gold);color:var(--burgundy-dark);}
    .livery-dl-ph{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);color:rgba(201,168,76,0.25);font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;cursor:not-allowed;white-space:nowrap;}

    /* ── FOOTER ── */
    footer{text-align:center;padding:40px;background:var(--burgundy-dark);border-top:2px solid var(--gold);}
    footer p{font-size:0.78rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;}
    footer span{color:var(--gold);}

    @media(max-width:900px){.nav-links{display:none;}.livery-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ── NAV ── -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-container">
    <div class="nav-logo" onclick="showPage('home')">
      <div class="nav-logo-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
      <div>
        <div class="nav-logo-title">BRS</div>
        <div class="nav-logo-sub">Burgundy Racing School</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a onclick="showPage('home')" id="nav-home" class="active">Accueil</a>
      <a onclick="scrollToSection('evenements')">Événements</a>
      <a onclick="scrollToSection('resultats')">Résultats</a>
      <a onclick="scrollToSection('membres')">Membres</a>
      <a onclick="showPage('lmu')" id="nav-lmu">🏁 Livrées LMU</a>
      <a onclick="showPage('iracing')" id="nav-iracing">🏁 Livrées iRacing</a>
      <a onclick="scrollToSection('recrutement')" style="color:var(--gold);border:1px solid var(--gold);padding:5px 14px;margin-left:10px;">🎮 Rejoins-nous</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ PAGE ACCUEIL -->
<div id="page-home" class="page active">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div id="hero">
    <div class="hero-logo-wrapper"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">BURGUNDY RACING SCHOOL</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Équipe sim-racing chill sur LMU &amp; iRacing · On roule ensemble, sans prise de tête</p>
    <div class="hero-tag">🎮 Équipe SimRacing</div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="scrollToSection('evenements')">Nos Événements</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="scrollToSection('membres')">Notre Équipe</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="showPage('lmu')">🏁 Livrées LMU</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="showPage('iracing')">🏁 Livrées iRacing</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ÉVÉNEMENTS -->
  <div id="section-evenements">
    <div class="section-wrapper">
      <h2 class="section-title">PROCHAINS ÉVÉNEMENTS</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
      <div class="events-grid">
        <div class="event-card">
          <div class="event-date">📅 11 — 12 Juillet 2026</div>
          <div class="event-name">24H de Spa</div>
          <div class="event-location">🏁 Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps</div>
          <div class="event-sim">🎮 iRacing</div>
          <span class="event-badge">À venir</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RÉSULTATS -->
  <div id="section-resultats" style="background:rgba(26,10,15,0.5);">
    <div class="section-wrapper">
      <h2 class="section-title">🏆 RÉSULTATS</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
      <p style="text-align:center;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.6);font-size:0.8rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:30px;">On pilote vite. On arrive (parfois) premier. 🚀</p>
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>🏁 POS.</th><th>👤 PILOTE</th><th>🏎️ COURSE</th><th>🎮 SIM / VOITURE</th><th>⏱️ MEILLEUR TOUR</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr><td style="color:#4CAF80;font-weight:700;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;">6ème</td><td>Hugo Martelet</td><td>24H du Mans Major Series 2026 <span style="font-size:0.7rem;color:rgba(76,175,80,0.5);">— 24h sur les nerfs, top 10 validé ! 💪</span></td><td>iRacing / Ferrari 296 GT3</td><td>⚡ 4:01.292</td></tr>
          <tr><td style="color:#aaaaaa;font-weight:700;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;">13ème</td><td>Hugo Martelet</td><td>4H du Nürburgring <span style="font-size:0.7rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);">— Le Nürb, ça pardonne pas... 🌧️</span></td><td>iRacing / Mercedes AMG GT3</td><td>—</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MEMBRES -->
  <div id="section-membres">
    <div class="section-wrapper">
      <h2 class="section-title">NOTRE ÉQUIPE</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
      <div class="members-grid">
        <div class="member-card founder">
          <div class="founder-badge">⭐ Fondateur</div>
          <div class="member-avatar">HM</div>
          <div class="member-name">Hugo Martelet</div>
          <div class="member-role">Fondateur &amp; Pilote</div>
          <div class="member-sim">🎮 iRacing &middot; Le Mans Ultimate</div>
          <div class="member-nationality">Français</div>
          <div class="member-participations">
            <div class="member-participations-title">📋 Participations</div>
            <div class="member-participation-item">
              <span><span class="participation-race">12H du Mans 2026</span><br><span class="participation-sim">Le Mans Ultimate</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="member-participation-item">
              <span><span class="participation-race">10H du Qatar 2026</span><br><span class="participation-sim">Le Mans Ultimate</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="member-participation-item">
              <span><span class="participation-race">4H de COTA 2026</span><br><span class="participation-sim">Le Mans Ultimate</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="member-participation-item">
              <span><span class="participation-race">4H du Nürburgring</span><br><span class="participation-sim">iRacing</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="member-participation-item">
              <span><span class="participation-race">24H Major Series</span><br><span class="participation-sim">iRacing</span></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="member-number">#01</div>
        </div>

        <div class="member-card">
          <div class="pilot-badge">🏎️ Pilote</div>
          <div class="member-avatar">TA</div>
          <div class="member-name">Thomas Antoine</div>
          <div class="member-role">Pilote BRS</div>
          <div class="member-sim">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</div>
          <div class="member-nationality">Français</div>
          <div class="member-participations">
            <div class="member-participations-title">📋 Participations</div>
            <div class="member-participation-item">
              <span><span class="participation-race">10H du Qatar 2026</span><br><span class="participation-sim">Le Mans Ultimate</span></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="member-number">#02</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RECRUTEMENT -->
  <div id="section-recrutement">
    <div class="section-wrapper">
      <div class="recruit-wrapper">
        <div class="recruit-tag">🎮 Recrutement Ouvert</div>
        <h2 class="recruit-title">Rejoins la <span>Burgundy Racing School</span></h2>
        <p class="recruit-text">
          La BRS recrute des pilotes motivés et sérieux sur <strong style="color:var(--gold)">iRacing</strong> et <strong style="color:var(--gold)">Le Mans Ultimate</strong>. 
          Notre objectif est simple : s'entraîner ensemble, progresser collectivement et représenter les couleurs de l'équipe lors des grandes courses d'endurance. 
          Que tu sois pilote expérimenté ou en pleine progression, si tu as la passion de la course et l'esprit d'équipe, tu as ta place ici.
        </p>

        <div class="recruit-cards">
          <div class="recruit-card">
            <div class="recruit-card-icon">🏎️</div>
            <div class="recruit-card-title">Pilote iRacing</div>
            <div class="recruit-card-text">Courses GT3, endurance, championnats internes. On s'entraîne régulièrement et on vise les grands événements iRacing ensemble.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="recruit-card">
            <div class="recruit-card-icon">🏁</div>
            <div class="recruit-card-title">Pilote Le Mans Ultimate</div>
            <div class="recruit-card-text">Engagements sur les grandes courses LMU : 24H du Mans, 10H du Qatar, 4H de COTA... Le rêve du Mans, on le vit ensemble.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="recruit-card">
            <div class="recruit-card-icon">📈</div>
            <div class="recruit-card-title">Progresser ensemble</div>
            <div class="recruit-card-text">Sessions d'entraînement collectives, debriefs, conseils techniques. L'objectif : que chaque pilote reparte meilleur qu'il n'est arrivé.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="recruit-card">
            <div class="recruit-card-icon">🤝</div>
            <div class="recruit-card-title">Esprit d'équipe</div>
            <div class="recruit-card-text">On mise sur la sérieux et la bonne ambiance. Pas de toxicité, du respect mutuel et une vraie vie d'équipe, en dehors comme en piste.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="recruit-requirements">
          <span class="recruit-req">✅ Sérieux & Régularité</span>
          <span class="recruit-req">✅ Esprit d'équipe</span>
          <span class="recruit-req">✅ iRacing ou LMU</span>
          <span class="recruit-req">✅ Envie de progresser</span>
          <span class="recruit-req">✅ Discord actif</span>
        </div>

        <a href="https://discord.gg/pvnEhs6ytp" target="_blank" class="recruit-discord">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M20.317 4.37a19.791 19.791 0 0 0-4.885-1.515.074.074 0 0 0-.079.037c-.21.375-.444.864-.608 1.25a18.27 18.27 0 0 0-5.487 0 12.64 12.64 0 0 0-.617-1.25.077.077 0 0 0-.079-.037A19.736 19.736 0 0 0 3.677 4.37a.07.07 0 0 0-.032.027C.533 9.046-.32 13.58.099 18.057c.002.022.015.045.03.06a19.9 19.9 0 0 0 5.993 3.03.078.078 0 0 0 .084-.028c.462-.63.874-1.295 1.226-1.994a.076.076 0 0 0-.041-.106 13.107 13.107 0 0 1-1.872-.892.077.077 0 0 1-.008-.128 10.2 10.2 0 0 0 .372-.292.074.074 0 0 1 .077-.01c3.928 1.793 8.18 1.793 12.062 0a.074.074 0 0 1 .078.01c.12.098.246.198.373.292a.077.077 0 0 1-.006.127 12.299 12.299 0 0 1-1.873.892.077.077 0 0 0-.041.107c.36.698.772 1.362 1.225 1.993a.076.076 0 0 0 .084.028 19.839 19.839 0 0 0 6.002-3.03.077.077 0 0 0 .032-.054c.5-5.177-.838-9.674-3.549-13.66a.061.061 0 0 0-.031-.03z"/></svg>
          Rejoindre le Discord BRS
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <footer>
    <p>© 2026 <span>BURGUNDY RACING SCHOOL</span> — Équipe SimRacing</p>
    <p style="margin-top:8px;">Équipe chill · LMU &amp; iRacing · Des événements entre passionnés</p>
  </footer>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ PAGE LMU -->
<div id="page-lmu" class="page">
  <div class="page-header">
    <div class="page-header-sim">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</div>
    <h1>LIVRÉES DISPONIBLES</h1>
    <p>Le Mans Ultimate &middot; Burgundy Racing School</p>
    <div class="page-header-count"><span>5</span> livrées disponibles sur <span>10</span></div>
  </div>
  <button class="back-btn" onclick="showPage('home')">← Retour à l'accueil</button>
  <div class="section-wrapper">
    <div class="livery-grid">

      <!-- BMW M4 LMGT3 -->
      <div class="livery-card real">
        <div class="livery-real-badge">✅ Disponible</div>
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <img class="car-img" src="BMW_GT3.png" alt="BMW M4 LMGT3"
            onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.querySelector('.ph-wrap').style.display='flex';">
          <div class="ph-wrap" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
            <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
            <div class="ph-label">BMW M4 LMGT3</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ph-num">01</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">BMW M4 LMGT3</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | BMW M4 LMGT3 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <a class="livery-dl" href="https://www.racecontrol.gg/liveries/321837" target="_blank">⬇ Télécharger</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- BMW M4 GT3 -->
      <div class="livery-card real">
        <div class="livery-real-badge">✅ Disponible</div>
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <img class="car-img" src="BMW_GT3.png" alt="BMW M4 GT3"
            onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.querySelector('.ph-wrap').style.display='flex';">
          <div class="ph-wrap" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
            <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
            <div class="ph-label">BMW M4 GT3</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ph-num">02</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">BMW M4 GT3</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | BMW M4 GT3 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <a class="livery-dl" href="https://www.racecontrol.gg/liveries/316900" target="_blank">⬇ Télécharger</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- PORSCHE -->
      <div class="livery-card real">
        <div class="livery-real-badge">✅ Disponible</div>
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <img class="car-img" src="Porsche.png" alt="Porsche 911 GT3 R LMGT3"
            onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.querySelector('.ph-wrap').style.display='flex';">
          <div class="ph-wrap" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
            <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
            <div class="ph-label">Porsche 911 GT3 R</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ph-num">03</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Porsche 911 GT3 R LMGT3</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | Porsche 911 GT3 R LMGT3 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <a class="livery-dl" href="https://www.racecontrol.gg/liveries/316951" target="_blank">⬇ Télécharger</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- LEXUS -->
      <div class="livery-card real">
        <div class="livery-real-badge">✅ Disponible</div>
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <img class="car-img" src="Lexus.png" alt="Lexus RCF LMGT3"
            onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.querySelector('.ph-wrap').style.display='flex';">
          <div class="ph-wrap" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
            <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
            <div class="ph-label">Lexus RCF LMGT3</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ph-num">04</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Lexus RCF LMGT3</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | Lexus RCF LMGT3 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <a class="livery-dl" href="https://www.racecontrol.gg/liveries/363114" target="_blank">⬇ Télécharger</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- LAMBO -->
      <div class="livery-card real">
        <div class="livery-real-badge">✅ Disponible</div>
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <img class="car-img" src="Lambo.png" alt="Lamborghini Huracán LMGT3 Evo2"
            onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.querySelector('.ph-wrap').style.display='flex';">
          <div class="ph-wrap" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
            <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
            <div class="ph-label">Lamborghini Huracán</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ph-num">05</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Lamborghini Huracán LMGT3 Evo2</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BSR - BURGUNDY RACING SCHOOL | Lamborghini Huracán LMGT3 Evo2 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <a class="livery-dl" href="https://www.racecontrol.gg/liveries/358274" target="_blank">⬇ Télécharger</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- PLACEHOLDERS (5 restantes) -->
      
      <div class="livery-card">
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
          <div class="ph-label">Aperçu bientôt disponible</div>
          <div class="ph-num">06</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Ferrari 296 GT3</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | Ferrari 296 GT3 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <span class="livery-dl-ph">⏳ Bientôt</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="livery-card">
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
          <div class="ph-label">Aperçu bientôt disponible</div>
          <div class="ph-num">07</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Mercedes-AMG GT3 Evo</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | Mercedes-AMG GT3 Evo | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <span class="livery-dl-ph">⏳ Bientôt</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="livery-card">
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
          <div class="ph-label">Aperçu bientôt disponible</div>
          <div class="ph-num">08</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Aston Martin Vantage LMGT3</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | Aston Martin Vantage LMGT3 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <span class="livery-dl-ph">⏳ Bientôt</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="livery-card">
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
          <div class="ph-label">Aperçu bientôt disponible</div>
          <div class="ph-num">09</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">McLaren 720S GT3 Evo</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | McLaren 720S GT3 Evo | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <span class="livery-dl-ph">⏳ Bientôt</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="livery-card">
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
          <div class="ph-label">Aperçu bientôt disponible</div>
          <div class="ph-num">010</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Toyota GR010 Hybrid</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | Toyota GR010 Hybrid | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 Le Mans Ultimate</span>
            <span class="livery-dl-ph">⏳ Bientôt</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
  <footer>
    <p>© 2026 <span>BURGUNDY RACING SCHOOL</span> — Équipe SimRacing</p>
    <p style="margin-top:8px;">Équipe chill · LMU &amp; iRacing · Des événements entre passionnés</p>
  </footer>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ PAGE iRACING -->
<div id="page-iracing" class="page">
  <div class="page-header">
    <div class="page-header-sim">🎮 iRacing</div>
    <h1>LIVRÉES DISPONIBLES</h1>
    <p>iRacing &middot; Burgundy Racing School</p>
    <div class="page-header-count"><span>1</span> livrée disponible sur <span>3</span></div>
  </div>
  <button class="back-btn" onclick="showPage('home')">← Retour à l'accueil</button>
  <div class="section-wrapper">
    <div class="livery-grid">

      <!-- BMW M4 GT3 iRacing -->
      <div class="livery-card real">
        <div class="livery-real-badge">✅ Disponible</div>
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <img class="car-img" src="BMW_GT3.png" alt="BMW M4 GT3"
            onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.querySelector('.ph-wrap').style.display='flex';">
          <div class="ph-wrap" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
            <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
            <div class="ph-label">BMW M4 GT3</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ph-num">01</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">BMW M4 GT3</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | BMW M4 GT3 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 iRacing</span>
            <a class="livery-dl" href="https://www.racecontrol.gg/liveries/316900" target="_blank">⬇ Télécharger</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      
      <div class="livery-card">
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
          <div class="ph-label">Aperçu bientôt disponible</div>
          <div class="ph-num">02</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Ferrari 296 GT3</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | Ferrari 296 GT3 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 iRacing</span>
            <span class="livery-dl-ph">⏳ Bientôt</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="livery-card">
        <div class="livery-thumb">
          <div class="ph-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BRS"></div>
          <div class="ph-label">Aperçu bientôt disponible</div>
          <div class="ph-num">03</div>
        </div>
        <div class="livery-info">
          <div class="livery-car">Porsche 911 GT3 R 992</div>
          <div class="livery-name">BRS - Burgundy Racing School E-Sport | Porsche 911 GT3 R 992 | RC | RaceControl</div>
          <div class="livery-footer">
            <span class="livery-sim-tag">🎮 iRacing</span>
            <span class="livery-dl-ph">⏳ Bientôt</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
  <footer>
    <p>© 2026 <span>BURGUNDY RACING SCHOOL</span> — Équipe SimRacing</p>
    <p style="margin-top:8px;">Équipe chill · LMU &amp; iRacing · Des événements entre passionnés</p>
  </footer>
</div>

<script>
  function showPage(page) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('page-' + page).classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
    if (page === 'home') document.getElementById('nav-home').classList.add('active');
    if (page === 'lmu') document.getElementById('nav-lmu').classList.add('active');
    if (page === 'iracing') document.getElementById('nav-iracing').classList.add('active');
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
  }

  function scrollToSection(id) {
    showPage('home');
    setTimeout(() => {
      const el = document.getElementById('section-' + id);
      if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    }, 100);
  }
</script>


  <!-- PARTICULES & ORBES ANIMÉES -->
  <div class="particles" id="particles"></div>
  <script>
    (function() {
      // Particules dorées
      const container = document.getElementById('particles');
      const count = 30;
      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        const p = document.createElement('div');
        p.classList.add('particle');
        const size = Math.random() * 4 + 1;
        const isGold = Math.random() > 0.4;
        p.style.cssText = [
          'width:' + size + 'px',
          'height:' + size + 'px',
          'left:' + Math.random() * 100 + '%',
          'background:' + (isGold ? 'rgba(201,168,76,' + (Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3) + ')' : 'rgba(139,21,53,' + (Math.random() * 0.4 + 0.2) + ')'),
          'box-shadow:0 0 ' + (size * 3) + 'px ' + (isGold ? 'rgba(201,168,76,0.6)' : 'rgba(109,15,42,0.6)'),
          'animation-duration:' + (Math.random() * 20 + 12) + 's',
          'animation-delay:-' + (Math.random() * 20) + 's',
          'opacity:0'
        ].join(';');
        container.appendChild(p);
      }

      // Orbes lumineux
      const orbs = [
        { color: 'rgba(109,15,42,0.18)', size: 400, x: '10%',  y: '20%', dur: '18s', delay: '0s'  },
        { color: 'rgba(109,15,42,0.15)', size: 500, x: '75%',  y: '60%', dur: '22s', delay: '-6s' },
        { color: 'rgba(201,168,76,0.06)', size: 350, x: '50%', y: '80%', dur: '15s', delay: '-3s' },
        { color: 'rgba(109,15,42,0.12)', size: 450, x: '85%',  y: '10%', dur: '20s', delay: '-10s'},
        { color: 'rgba(201,168,76,0.05)', size: 300, x: '20%', y: '70%', dur: '17s', delay: '-8s' },
      ];
      orbs.forEach(function(o) {
        const el = document.createElement('div');
        el.classList.add('orb');
        el.style.cssText = [
          'width:' + o.size + 'px',
          'height:' + o.size + 'px',
          'background:' + o.color,
          'left:' + o.x,
          'top:' + o.y,
          'animation-duration:' + o.dur,
          'animation-delay:' + o.delay
        ].join(';');
        document.body.appendChild(el);
      });
    })();
  </script>


  <!-- ÉTINCELLES DE COURSE -->
  <canvas id="sparksCanvas" style="position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;"></canvas>
  <script>
  (function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('sparksCanvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
      canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
      canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    });

    const sparks = [];
    const COLORS = [
      'rgba(201,168,76,', // or
      'rgba(232,201,122,', // or clair
      'rgba(255,220,80,',  // jaune doré
      'rgba(180,130,40,',  // or foncé
    ];

    function createSpark() {
      const x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
      const y = Math.random() * canvas.height;
      const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
      const speed = Math.random() * 2.5 + 0.5;
      const length = Math.random() * 18 + 4;
      const color = COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random() * COLORS.length)];
      const life = Math.random() * 60 + 30;
      sparks.push({
        x, y,
        vx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,
        vy: Math.sin(angle) * speed - Math.random() * 1.5,
        length,
        color,
        alpha: Math.random() * 0.7 + 0.3,
        life,
        maxLife: life,
        width: Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.3,
        gravity: 0.04 + Math.random() * 0.03,
        tail: [],
      });
    }

    function animate() {
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      // Créer de nouvelles étincelles
      if (sparks.length < 55 && Math.random() < 0.4) createSpark();

      for (let i = sparks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        const s = sparks[i];
        s.life--;
        s.x += s.vx;
        s.y += s.vy;
        s.vy += s.gravity;
        s.vx *= 0.98;
        const progress = s.life / s.maxLife;
        const alpha = s.alpha * progress;

        // Tracer l'étincelle comme une traînée
        ctx.save();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(s.x, s.y);
        ctx.lineTo(s.x - s.vx * s.length, s.y - s.vy * s.length);
        ctx.strokeStyle = s.color + alpha + ')';
        ctx.lineWidth = s.width * progress;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.shadowColor = s.color + '0.8)';
        ctx.shadowBlur = 6;
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.restore();

        // Petit point brillant à la tête
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(s.x, s.y, s.width * 1.5 * progress, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = s.color + (alpha * 1.5 > 1 ? 1 : alpha * 1.5) + ')';
        ctx.fill();

        if (s.life <= 0) sparks.splice(i, 1);
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    // Pré-remplir un peu
    for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) createSpark();
    animate();
  })();
  </script>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- BOUTON FLOTTANT RÉSEAUX SOCIAUX           -->
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<style>
  /* Bouton flottant */
  .social-float-btn {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 30px;
    right: 30px;
    z-index: 9999;
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6D0F2A, #C9A84C);
    border: 2px solid #C9A84C;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(201,168,76,0.4);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .social-float-btn:hover {
    transform: scale(1.1);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.6);
  }

  /* Overlay */
  .social-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    z-index: 9998;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
    animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease;
  }
  .social-overlay.active { display: block; }

  /* Pop-up */
  .social-popup {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 100px;
    right: 30px;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: linear-gradient(160deg, #4A0A1C, #1A0A0F);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 24px 20px;
    min-width: 240px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.1);
    animation: slideUp 0.3s ease;
  }
  .social-popup.active { display: block; }

  @keyframes slideUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; }
    to   { opacity: 1; }
  }

  .social-popup-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    color: #C9A84C;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    padding-bottom: 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  }

  .social-popup-links {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .social-popup-link {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
  }
  .social-popup-link:hover {
    transform: translateX(-4px);
    border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08);
  }

  .social-popup-link .s-icon {
    width: 38px;
    height: 38px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .s-discord  { background: #5865F2; }
  .s-instagram { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f09433, #e6683c, #dc2743, #cc2366, #bc1888); }
  .s-tiktok   { background: #000; border: 1px solid #333; }

  .social-popup-link .s-label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  .social-popup-link .s-name  { color: #fff; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .social-popup-link .s-handle { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 400; margin-top: 1px; }

  .social-popup-close {
    position: absolute;
    top: 10px;
    right: 12px;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: rgba(201,168,76,0.5);
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .social-popup-close:hover { color: #C9A84C; }
</style>

<!-- Overlay -->
<div class="social-overlay" id="socialOverlay" onclick="closeSocialPopup()"></div>

<!-- Pop-up -->
<div class="social-popup" id="socialPopup">
  <button class="social-popup-close" onclick="closeSocialPopup()">✕</button>
  <div class="social-popup-title">🏁 Nous suivre</div>
  <div class="social-popup-links">

    <a href="https://discord.com/invite/pvnEhs6ytp" target="_blank" class="social-popup-link">
      <div class="s-icon s-discord">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M20.317 4.37a19.791 19.791 0 0 0-4.885-1.515.074.074 0 0 0-.079.037c-.21.375-.444.864-.608 1.25a18.27 18.27 0 0 0-5.487 0 12.64 12.64 0 0 0-.617-1.25.077.077 0 0 0-.079-.037A19.736 19.736 0 0 0 3.677 4.37a.07.07 0 0 0-.032.027C.533 9.046-.32 13.58.099 18.057c.002.022.015.043.033.055A19.9 19.9 0 0 0 5.9 21.44a.077.077 0 0 0 .084-.028c.462-.63.874-1.295 1.226-1.994a.076.076 0 0 0-.041-.106 13.107 13.107 0 0 1-1.872-.892.077.077 0 0 1-.008-.128 10.2 10.2 0 0 0 .372-.292.074.074 0 0 1 .077-.01c3.928 1.793 8.18 1.793 12.062 0a.074.074 0 0 1 .078.01c.12.098.246.198.373.292a.077.077 0 0 1-.006.127 12.299 12.299 0 0 1-1.873.892.077.077 0 0 0-.041.107c.36.698.772 1.362 1.225 1.993a.076.076 0 0 0 .084.028 19.839 19.839 0 0 0 6.002-3.328.077.077 0 0 0 .032-.054c.5-5.177-.838-9.674-3.549-13.66a.061.061 0 0 0-.031-.03zM8.02 15.33c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.956-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.956 2.418-2.157 2.418zm7.975 0c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.955-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.946 2.418-2.157 2.418z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="s-label">
        <span class="s-name">Discord</span>
        <span class="s-handle">Rejoins le serveur BRS</span>
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/burgundy.racing.school/" target="_blank" class="social-popup-link">
      <div class="s-icon s-instagram">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zM12 0C8.741 0 8.333.014 7.053.072 2.695.272.273 2.69.073 7.052.014 8.333 0 8.741 0 12c0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98C8.333 23.986 8.741 24 12 24c3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98C15.668.014 15.259 0 12 0zm0 5.838a6.162 6.162 0 1 0 0 12.324 6.162 6.162 0 0 0 0-12.324zM12 16a4 4 0 1 1 0-8 4 4 0 0 1 0 8zm6.406-11.845a1.44 1.44 0 1 0 0 2.881 1.44 1.44 0 0 0 0-2.881z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="s-label">
        <span class="s-name">Instagram</span>
        <span class="s-handle">@burgundy.racing.school</span>
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@rookiedanslepaddock" target="_blank" class="social-popup-link">
      <div class="s-icon s-tiktok">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 0 1-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 0 1-2.88 2.5 2.89 2.89 0 0 1-2.89-2.89 2.89 2.89 0 0 1 2.89-2.89c.28 0 .54.04.79.1V9.01a6.33 6.33 0 0 0-.79-.05 6.34 6.34 0 0 0-6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 0 0 6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 0 0 6.33-6.34V8.69a8.22 8.22 0 0 0 4.81 1.54V6.78a4.85 4.85 0 0 1-1.04-.09z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="s-label">
        <span class="s-name">TikTok</span>
        <span class="s-handle">@rookiedanslepaddock</span>
      </div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Bouton flottant -->
<button class="social-float-btn" onclick="toggleSocialPopup()" title="Nos réseaux">
  🏁
</button>

<script>
  function toggleSocialPopup() {
    document.getElementById('socialPopup').classList.toggle('active');
    document.getElementById('socialOverlay').classList.toggle('active');
  }
  function closeSocialPopup() {
    document.getElementById('socialPopup').classList.remove('active');
    document.getElementById('socialOverlay').classList.remove('active');
  }
  // Ouverture automatique après 20 secondes
  setTimeout(function() {
    document.getElementById('socialPopup').classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('socialOverlay').classList.add('active');
  }, 5000);
</script>

</body>
</html>
